description: 10 high-pressure scenarios for each team in team-packs-v3

scenarios.prompt: [Startup Exec Team] Board demands 30-day turnaround plan after missed targets.
[Startup Exec Team] Unexpected budget cut of 25% while preserving mission-critical outcomes.
[Startup Exec Team] Regulator requests immediate evidence and policy compliance mapping.
[Startup Exec Team] Critical vendor outage impacts delivery pipeline.
[Startup Exec Team] Public backlash requires coordinated response and trust recovery.
[Startup Exec Team] Cross-team priorities conflict; need a single committed plan.
[Startup Exec Team] Demand spike (3x) strains operations and customer experience.
[Startup Exec Team] Data inconsistency undermines reports and decisions.
[Startup Exec Team] Delivery deadline moved up by 50% with no scope increase.
[Startup Exec Team] Critical handoff repeatedly fails between functions.
